zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume FitzWarin於1251年出生在英國史洛普爾厄普頓 馬尼亞時，他的父親Fulk FitzWarin IV44歲，母親Constance de Tosny36歲。他於1276年與Alice de Somery在英國英格蘭史洛普爾厄普頓 馬尼亞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1290年6月13日在英國格盧斯特斯爾阿爾維斯頓享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume FitzWarin was born in 1251, in Upton Magna, Shropshire, England, his father, Fulk FitzWarin IV, was 44 and his mother, Constance de Tosny, was 36. He married Alice de Somery in 1276, in Upton Magna, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 13 June 1290, in Alveston, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume FitzWarin est né en 1251, à Upton Magna, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Fulk FitzWarin IV, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Constance de Tosny, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Somery en 1276, à Upton Magna, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1290, à Alveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume FitzWarinが1251年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウプトン マグナで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin IVは44歳，母Constance de Tosnyは36歳であった。1276年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウプトン マグナでAlice de Someryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1290年6月13日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアルベストンで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume FitzWarin(이)가 1251년 영국 슈럽실르 업턴 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin IV(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Tosny(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 업턴 매그나에서 Alice de Somery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1290년 6월 13일 영국 그루스스터실르 앨베스턴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume FitzWarin родился в 1251 г. в местности уптон магна, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin IV было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Constance de Tosny, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Somery в 1276 г. в местности уптон магна, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 13 июня 1290 г. в местности алвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.
